period.timezone_note: Run date is 2026-07-07 KST. The tracked checkout did not contain data/history.json at start, so a local history snapshot was restored as an ignored validation copy before annotation.

clusters.title: Living Room voice surface labels
clusters.summary: `Living Room`은 일반 텍스트가 아니라 Discord의 음성 채널 주변에서 보이는 별도 대화/좌석형 표면의 이름으로 보입니다.
clusters.summary_en: `Living Room` appears to be a Discord voice-adjacent surface label, not just a generic room name.
clusters.source_context: canary/9f0dae291a21711f.js contains the Living Room label set together: Go to Living Room, Switch to Living Room, Switch back to Voice Channel, Back to Living Room, and Available Seat.

clusters.title: Storefront preview and publish status
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Discord 상점 또는 게임 상점 storefront가 초안, 라이브, 예약 공개, 교체됨 같은 게시 상태를 갖는 흐름을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe storefront preview and publishing states such as Draft, Live, scheduled publishing, and replaced versions.
clusters.source_context: canary/ddd4c83ed7a83464.js groups storefront status labels with Game Shop, Orbs, Nitro-exclusive purchase, and item detail strings.

clusters.title: Game squad linking and post tags
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 게임 관련 squad/post 흐름에서 Discord 계정 연결, 빈 자리 표시, 참가 요청, 태그 수 제한을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings explain Discord account linking, open squad spots, join requests, and tag limits for a game-related squad or post flow.
clusters.source_context: data/history.json modified four English strings at 2026-07-06T20:16:56Z: account-linking copy now says Discord account, squad copy mentions open spots/request to join/live squad info, and post tags now include a max tags limit.

clusters.title: Guild activity summary labels
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 서버별 새 항목, 멘션, 활동을 묶어 보여주는 요약 라벨로 보입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These appear to be per-server labels for grouping new items, mentions, and activity.
clusters.source_context: data/history.json added three labels at 2026-07-06T21:37:37Z: New in {guildName}, Mentioned in {guildName}, and Activity in {guildName}, each with an optional count suffix.

clusters.title: Recent conversations message navigation
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 최근 대화 목록을 보거나 대화가 있던 채널로 이동하는 탐색/검색형 UI에 쓰이는 라벨입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings label a navigation or search-style surface for viewing recent conversations and jumping back to the original channel.
clusters.source_context: canary/047e812b8f41b70f.js places Recent Conversations, View in channel, message loading failure, and no-conversations labels beside search/filter strings such as No Results, in all Direct Messages, and in {count} DMs.

clusters.title: Family Center guardian requirement and disconnect warnings
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 일부 지역의 13~16세 청소년 계정에 연결된 보호자가 필요하며, 보호자 연결을 끊으면 Discord 접근이나 Family Center 활동 정보 접근에 영향이 있음을 알립니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings warn that teens ages 13-16 in some regions may need a connected guardian, and that disconnecting a guardian affects Discord access or Family Center activity visibility.
clusters.source_context: canary/e95d7a352a49d28f.js adds the new connected-guardian requirement and disconnect-warning strings in the Family Center bundle alongside connection limits, disconnect errors, and guardian activity-visibility copy. latest_changes.json also contains this cluster as the current string payload.

annotated_strings.value: This storefront was published {timestamp} and has been replaced by a newer one.
This storefront has no scheduled publish time.
This storefront was published {timestamp} and has been replaced by a newer one.
This storefront has no scheduled publish time.
Link your Discord account so players can see your squad's open spots and request to join!
[Link your Discord account]({onClick}) to show live squad info and open spots.
[Link your Discord account]({onClick}) so players can see your squad's open spots!
Add tags to help the right players find your post. Max {tagsMax} tags.
We ran into an issue loading messages.
I understand that disconnecting this teen will remove my access to information about their Discord activity.
This will remove {username} as your connected guardian
Laws in their region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. Without a connected guardian, {username} won’t be able to continue accessing Discord.
I understand that Discord requires at least one guardian to be connected to this teen’s account for them to continue using Discord.
Disconnecting from {username} will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke your access to information about their Discord activity.
This will remove your guardian connection with this account.
Disconnecting from {username} will send them a notification that you removed them. It will also revoke their access to information about your Discord activity.
I understand that Discord requires at least one guardian to be connected to my account for me to continue using Discord.
Laws in your region require teens ages 13–16 to have a connected guardian. Without a connected guardian, you won’t be able to continue accessing Discord.
I understand that disconnecting this guardian will remove their access to information about my Discord activity.

deferred.checked_context: Rechecked current Family Center guardian QR/link context; still a connector between code and link sharing options rather than a standalone product term.
deferred.next_check_hint: Keep deferred unless future copy gives this connector an independent feature meaning.

deferred.checked_context: Rechecked current Family Center guardian QR/link context; still only a connector word.
deferred.next_check_hint: Keep deferred unless the key is repurposed into a concrete feature label.

deferred.checked_context: Appeared beside storefront/developer flow strings, but the label itself is a generic on/off state and was also deleted later in the window.
deferred.next_check_hint: Annotate only if future strings tie this key to a named public setting or feature surface.

deferred.value: This flow has been disabled via developer tools
deferred.checked_context: Appeared in the storefront/account-linking window and was deleted later; wording points to developer tooling rather than a stable user-facing recovery path.
deferred.next_check_hint: Recheck only if the same message appears in a public user flow with a concrete action or support path.

search_signals.notes: Search Console was not used. Local history, public web JSON, latest_changes.json, and current Canary locale bundle snippets were sufficient for this run.

commands: scoped analysis/report private-path and forbidden-phrase scan
validations.notes: Forbidden phrase scan was scoped to current-run Codex-added analysis fields, latest_changes string_context, and the current string-context report to avoid false positives from existing Discord source strings.

latest_changes.reason: The current latest_changes.json payload contains Family Center string_changes, so top-level string_context was added only for those current keys with generated analysis.
